text: Hirslanden stands for high-quality, responsible, self-determined and integrated healthcare for people in every stage of life. We understand the needs of our patients and customers and offer individualised medical services from birth to old age and from prevention to healing – on an outpatient and inpatient basis, at any time, physically and digitally.

Welcome the newborns from our maternity hospitals in Switzerland. All of our decisions in life have consequences - and with all of life's consequences, we're here for you: Learn More The Hirslanden Healthline advises you by telephone on all matters relating to your health in all situations - wherever and whenever.
Official Medical Partner of Corinne Suter Mehdi Bensouda manager of hospitals in Lausanne Gilles Rufenacht appointed new CEO of Hirslanden Group.
